name: Electrical Installation & HVAC 1 Solution
notes: Benchtop kit covering electron flow theory, AC/DC supplies, multimeter use, and simple electrical calculations. Includes printable worksheets and teacher notes. Aligned to City & Guilds 7202 unit 107.

name: Electrical Installation & HVAC 2 Solution
notes: Level 2 benchtop kit covering AC theory, electromagnetism, RCD operation, and fault diagnosis. Includes all LK5000 components. Aligned to City & Guilds 8202 unit 202.

name: Level 3 Electrical Installation & HVAC Circuit Principles
notes: Level 3 Locktronics kit covering inductive/capacitive reactance, impedance, contactors, relays, solenoids, MCBs, and RCDs. Aligned to City & Guilds 8202 Level 3.

name: Sense and Control – Industrial
notes: Industrial maintenance trainer covering sensing technologies, signal conditioning, and control systems. Aligned to industrial maintenance programmes.

name: PLC Fundamentals Trainer
notes: PLC fundamentals trainer for maintenance engineers covering ladder logic, I/O wiring, and fault finding on programmable logic controllers.

name: Wind Tunnel
notes: Benchtop wind tunnel for investigating aerodynamic forces, lift, drag, and airflow around aerofoil sections. Covers Bernoulli's principle, Reynolds number, and flight dynamics. Aligned to aerospace and engineering science programmes.
